variants: Calina DeSantis is a dedicated professional fluent in Bulgarian Cyrillic, currently contributing her talents at Ultravue Marketing. She commenced her journey in design at the Quartzfire School of Design, which laid the foundation for her career. Originally from Pebblefin Creek, her roots have inspired a deep commitment to community service. In addition to her professional work, Calina is actively involved as a Housing Equity Partner Sunspar Fellowship, advocating for equitable housing solutions. Her efforts reflect her belief in the importance of social justice and community equity.
